title: oxalis salteriana
intro: Oxalis salteriana, also known as Wood Sorrel or Wild Sorrel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the oxalis genus. The plant is recognized for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of oxalic acid, which has been used to treat conditions such as sore throats, fever, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Oxalis salteriana include its antioxidant properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and inflammation, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of urinary tract infections. Oxalis salteriana is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
